출애굽기 30:1.content: “You shall make an altar to burn incense on. You shall make it of acacia wood.

출애굽기 30:2.content: Its length shall be a cubit, and its width a cubit. It shall be square, and its height shall be two cubits. Its horns shall be of one piece with it.

출애굽기 30:3.content: You shall overlay it with pure gold, its top, its sides around it, and its horns; and you shall make a gold molding around it.

출애굽기 30:4.content: You shall make two golden rings for it under its molding; on its two ribs, on its two sides you shall make them; and they shall be for places for poles with which to bear it.

출애굽기 30:5.content: You shall make the poles of acacia wood, and overlay them with gold.

출애굽기 30:6.content: You shall put it before the veil that is by the ark of the covenant, before the mercy seat that is over the covenant, where I will meet with you.

출애굽기 30:7.content: Aaron shall burn incense of sweet spices on it every morning. When he tends the lamps, he shall burn it.

출애굽기 30:8.content: When Aaron lights the lamps at evening, he shall burn it, a perpetual incense before Yahweh throughout your generations.

출애굽기 30:9.content: You shall offer no strange incense on it, nor burnt offering, nor meal offering; and you shall pour no drink offering on it.

출애굽기 30:10.content: Aaron shall make atonement on its horns once in the year; with the blood of the sin offering of atonement once in the year he shall make atonement for it throughout your generations. It is most holy to Yahweh.”

출애굽기 30:12.content: “When you take a census of the children of Israel, according to those who are counted among them, then each man shall give a ransom for his soul to Yahweh, when you count them; that there be no plague among them when you count them.

출애굽기 30:13.content: They shall give this, everyone who passes over to those who are counted, half a shekel according to the shekel of the sanctuary (the shekel is twenty gerahs); half a shekel for an offering to Yahweh.

출애굽기 30:14.content: Everyone who passes over to those who are counted, from twenty years old and upward, shall give the offering to Yahweh.

출애굽기 30:15.content: The rich shall not give more, and the poor shall not give less, than the half shekel, when they give the offering of Yahweh, to make atonement for your souls.

출애굽기 30:16.content: You shall take the atonement money from the children of Israel, and shall appoint it for the service of the Tent of Meeting; that it may be a memorial for the children of Israel before Yahweh, to make atonement for your souls.”

출애굽기 30:18.content: “You shall also make a basin of bronze, and its base of bronze, in which to wash. You shall put it between the Tent of Meeting and the altar, and you shall put water in it.

출애굽기 30:19.content: Aaron and his sons shall wash their hands and their feet in it.

출애굽기 30:20.content: When they go into the Tent of Meeting, they shall wash with water, that they not die; or when they come near to the altar to minister, to burn an offering made by fire to Yahweh.

출애굽기 30:21.content: So they shall wash their hands and their feet, that they not die. This shall be a statute forever to them, even to him and to his descendants throughout their generations.”

출애굽기 30:22.content: Moreover Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,

출애굽기 30:23.content: “Also take fine spices: of liquid myrrh, five hundred shekels; and of fragrant cinnamon half as much, even two hundred and fifty; and of fragrant cane, two hundred and fifty;

출애굽기 30:24.content: and of cassia five hundred, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; and a hin of olive oil.

출애굽기 30:25.content: You shall make it into a holy anointing oil, a perfume compounded after the art of the perfumer: it shall be a holy anointing oil.

출애굽기 30:26.content: You shall use it to anoint the Tent of Meeting, the ark of the covenant,

출애굽기 30:27.content: the table and all its articles, the lamp stand and its accessories, the altar of incense,

출애굽기 30:28.content: the altar of burnt offering with all its utensils, and the basin with its base.

출애굽기 30:29.content: You shall sanctify them, that they may be most holy. Whatever touches them shall be holy.

출애굽기 30:30.content: You shall anoint Aaron and his sons, and sanctify them, that they may minister to me in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 30:31.content: You shall speak to the children of Israel, saying, ‘This shall be a holy anointing oil to me throughout your generations.

출애굽기 30:32.content: It shall not be poured on man’s flesh, and do not make any like it, according to its composition. It is holy. It shall be holy to you.

출애굽기 30:33.content: Whoever compounds any like it, or whoever puts any of it on a stranger, he shall be cut off from his people.’ ”

출애굽기 30:34.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “Take to yourself sweet spices, gum resin, onycha, and galbanum; sweet spices with pure frankincense. There shall be an equal weight of each.

출애굽기 30:35.content: You shall make incense of it, a perfume after the art of the perfumer, seasoned with salt, pure and holy.

출애굽기 30:36.content: You shall beat some of it very small, and put some of it before the covenant in the Tent of Meeting, where I will meet with you. It shall be to you most holy.

출애굽기 30:37.content: The incense which you shall make, according to its composition you shall not make for yourselves: it shall be to you holy for Yahweh.

출애굽기 30:38.content: Whoever shall make any like that, to smell of it, he shall be cut off from his people.”
